headline: Prime Day has some solid deals on Switch 2, PS5, and Xbox games
summary: Prime Day offers significant discounts on games. Deals available for Switch 2, PS5, and Xbox. Both physical and digital game copies are on sale.

headline: Prime Day has served up several great deals on 4K TVs
summary: Prime Day is a prime time for 4K TV deals. New 2026 models are seeing discounts. Best deals often on slightly older models.

headline: Tesla claims driver 'manually overrode self-driving' in deadly Texas crash
summary: Tesla blames driver for a fatal Texas crash. Company claims driver overrode Full Self-Driving. A 76-year-old woman died in the incident.

headline: Here are the best Prime Day deals on the Verge staff's favorite stuff
summary: The Verge compiled top Prime Day deals. Discounts are on staff-favorite items. Find useful gear, tech or otherwise.

headline: These 10 LEGO Sets Are On Sale for Prime Day Before They Retire Forever
summary: Ten LEGO sets are on Prime Day sale. These specific sets are retiring soon. Grab them before they're gone forever.

headline: Robo Rally Dice Game Review
summary: Review of Robo Rally Dice game. It simplifies the original crazy gameplay. The trade-off is considered worthwhile.

headline: Lords of the Fallen 2 Delayed to 2027
summary: Lords of the Fallen 2 release delayed. Game pushed back to early 2027. Originally planned for this year.

headline: The Apple Watch Series 11 Drops to Its Lowest Price Ever for Amazon Prime Day
summary: Apple Watch Series 11 hits lowest Prime Day price. It's considered the best model for most iPhone users. Great opportunity for a tech upgrade.

headline: Hundreds of schools plan closures ahead of red heat alerts
summary: Hundreds of schools closing due to heat alerts. Temperatures topped 34.6 C in England. Scotland and N. Ireland saw year's hottest days.

headline: From cool-down spots to chalk on windows - how Europe is coping with the heat
summary: Europe is implementing various heat coping strategies. Measures include designated cool-down spots. Citizens are finding creative ways to beat the heat.

headline: Starmer holds talks with Burnham as he seeks 'orderly' transition
summary: Keir Starmer holds talks with Andy Burnham. Starmer seeks an 'orderly' transition. Outgoing PM offers civil service access to Labour candidates.

headline: Peter Murrell jailed for more than five years for embezzling SNP funds
summary: Peter Murrell sentenced to over five years in jail. Former SNP chief executive embezzled £400,000. Funds were stolen over a 12-year period.
